ぷはぁ～～～！ 生き返るぅ～！<br>やっぱり、仕事のあとはいっぱい食べて、いっ:
Ahhh! That hits the spot! After work, nothing beats eating and
drinking to your heart's content!
それは何よりだ。……そういえば、宝探しが失敗に終わっても、<br>前ほど落ち込ま:
That's good to hear... You know, you don't get as discouraged about
failed treasure hunts as you used to, do you?
ま、そうだね～。ワタシにとって一番の宝物は、もう見つかってるしね～。<br>うふ:
Well, I guess so. I mean, I've already found my greatest treasure.
Ufufu!
は？ 一番の宝物？ なんだそりゃ？<br>初耳なんだが、そんなお宝いつの間に見つ:
Huh? The greatest treasure? What's that? I've never heard of it.
When did you find something like that?
（なんだよー。温泉でちゃんと、気持ち伝えたのに……。<br>肝心なところで鈍感な:
(Oh, come on... I told you exactly how I felt at the hot spring... You're
so dense when it counts...)
え？ ホントに分かってないの？: Huh? You seriously don't get it?
なんだよ？ そんな怖い顔で睨むなよ……: What? Don't give me that scary look...
（でも……ま、いっか。こうやって一緒にいられるだけで、<br>ワタシは幸せなんだ:
(But... well, never mind. Just being together like this makes me happy
enough.)
ふ～んだ、教えな～い！<br>でも、いつか司令官にも分かる日がくるといいね～♪:
Hmph! I'm not telling! But I hope you'll understand someday,
Commander!
さぁ、今日も失敗しちゃったけど、<br>いっぱい食べて、いっぱい寝て、明日またが:
Well, we struck out again today, but let's eat our fill, sleep well, and
give it another shot tomorrow!
一番大切な宝物が何なのか気が付いた彼女の満面の笑顔は、<br>希望の光で満ち溢れ:
Overflowing with the light of hope, her beaming smile showed she had
finally realized what her most precious treasure truly was.
